description: Change request resolved — multi-line reply preserves newlines

values.originalMessage: Add the new opening hours to the homepage
values.reply:
Done.

The footer now shows: Mon-Fri 8-6, Sat 9-12, closed Sundays.
Also updated the booking page to match.

expected.subject: Your change is done ✓
expected.body:
Hi Sam,

About this one:

  "Add the new opening hours to the homepage"

My reply:

Done.

The footer now shows: Mon-Fri 8-6, Sat 9-12, closed Sundays.
Also updated the booking page to match.

You can see your other requests + submit new ones from your
dashboard any time.

— Ben
